title: Ukrainian Ukrainian Melty Cheese Bake
description: A delicious ukrainian melty cheese bake that's perfect for a cozy evening, made with love and care.

ingredients.name: Ukrainian melty cheese
ingredients.notes: You can use a mix of cheddar and mozzarella for a similar taste

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of bread, but a crusty one works best

ingredients.name: Spicy sauce
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of spicy sauce, like sriracha or hot sauce

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of milk, but whole milk works best

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of butter, but unsalted works best

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of salt, but kosher salt works best

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of pepper, but black pepper works best

instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and place them in a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the Ukrainian melty cheese, milk, and spicy sauce until smooth.
Pour the cheese mixture over the bread cubes and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Dot the top of the mixture with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
